author: Katsuhiko Hata
description: Zoom the whole app in and out with Ctrl + mouse wheel (scroll up to zoom in, down to zoom out), like a browser. Trackpad pinch-to-zoom works too. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: hata-suriiken
manifest.description: Zoom the whole app in and out with Ctrl + mouse wheel (scroll up to zoom in, down to zoom out), like a browser. Trackpad pinch-to-zoom works too.
manifest.name: Ctrl+Scroll Zoom

name: Ctrl+Scroll Zoom

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Automated release. Release assets carry GitHub build-provenance attestations (verify with: gh attestation verify <file> --repo hata-suriiken/obsidian-ctrl-scroll-zoom).
